knowledge.title: Overpass A site: heaven + connector crossfire
knowledge.description: CT A: one player heaven (above site), one player connector (close angle from CT spawn). Heaven covers long A, connector traps the entry. Both on site = double frag from a long smoke.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: heaven-connector crossfire is standard Overpass A

knowledge.title: Overpass B site: pillar + bench anchor
knowledge.description: CT B: one player pillar (close angle on tunnels exit), one player bench (off-angle from monster). Pillar traps the tunnel push, bench trades. Avoid both on site — monster molly frags both.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: pillar-bench crossfire is standard Overpass B

knowledge.title: Overpass monster: monster control with utility
knowledge.description: CT monster player holds monster with molly + flash. Molly delays the T monster push by ~3 seconds; flash supports a peek. Losing monster control loses ~25% of B round win expectation.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: monster control predicts B round outcome on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass A execute: smoke heaven + smoke long + molly site
knowledge.description: A execute: smoke heaven (cuts the high angle), smoke long (cuts long A), molly site (clears the close hold), flash from short for entry. ~70% plant rate with full A execute on Overpass.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: full-utility A execute is standard Overpass T A strat

knowledge.title: Overpass B execute: smoke heaven + molly bench + flash entry
knowledge.description: B execute from monster: smoke heaven (cuts the rotate), molly bench (clears the off-angle), flash from monster for entry. Plant for tunnels angle. ~68% plant rate with full B execute.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: full-utility B execute is most reliable Overpass B strat

knowledge.title: Overpass long molly: deny long A control
knowledge.description: Throw a molly to long A within the first 10 seconds. Molly delays any long push by ~3 seconds and burns CT utility. Cheap, consistent setup utility.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: long molly is in ~75% of T A hits on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass pistol: T B monster fast push
knowledge.description: T pistol on Overpass: stack 4 monster + 1 connector for fast B hit. Plant for tunnels angle. CTs cannot rotate from A in time. ~58% T pistol WR with monster stack.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: monster stack is the highest-WR Overpass T pistol

knowledge.title: Overpass force buy: B monster with armor + Galils
knowledge.description: Overpass B forces work because monster execute is utility-driven and short. A forces have low success — long A punishes under-buys.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: Overpass B force wins ~40%, A force ~22%

knowledge.title: Overpass save: route through T spawn or playground
knowledge.description: Overpass saves route back through T spawn or playground (the side route). Avoid long A saves — long is the most punished save route. Tier-1 retention rate ~70%.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: tier-1 Overpass save retention ~70%

knowledge.title: Overpass long duel: pre-aim head level on bombsite corner
knowledge.description: Long A duels are decided by pre-aim. The bombsite corner is head-level for both sides. Pre-aim the corner as you peek long.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: top players hold long with head-level pre-aim >95%

knowledge.title: Overpass monster duel: spray transfer through smoke
knowledge.description: Monster duels happen at close range and often through smoke. Spray transfer (kill one, walk crosshair) wins more than tap. Monster fights reward muscle-memory spray.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: spray-transfer accounts for ~40% of monster frags

knowledge.title: Overpass connector duel: jiggle peek for the AWP
knowledge.description: Connector AWP duels are decided by who shoulder peeks first. Bait the AWP shot, then push within 0.4 seconds while the AWPer is in scope-out animation.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: shoulder peek + commit wins ~55% of connector AWP duels

knowledge.title: Overpass long contact: rotate to B on a trade
knowledge.description: If you take a long A trade, rotate to B through monster within 6 seconds. The long contact pulls CT A players; B opens up. Slow play after long contact wastes the rotation window.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: post-long-contact B execute wins ~58% on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass IGL: monster info gates the call
knowledge.description: Send a monster player on every default round. Monster sound cues confirm CT B count and trigger A vs B commit. Highest-value information point on Overpass.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: tier-1 Overpass IGLs base ~60% of commits on monster info

knowledge.title: Overpass A fake: 25-second commit
knowledge.description: A fakes on Overpass commit utility for 25 seconds (long smoke + heaven flash + gunfire) then re-rotate to B through monster. 25 seconds is the sweet spot — shorter fakes don't pull rotates.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: 25-second A fake to B execute wins ~58% on Overpass

knowledge.title: Overpass A retake: from connector with smoke + flash
knowledge.description: A retake from connector with smoke (cuts the lurker), flash, 3-stack push. Avoid heaven retakes — heaven is exposed to long lurk. Connector retakes win ~50%.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: connector retakes win ~50% on Overpass A

knowledge.title: Overpass B post-plant: hold from monster lurk
knowledge.description: Post-plant B: lurk back through monster to hold the retake from heaven AND see the rotate from A. Avoid sitting on site — bench molly hits site first.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: monster lurk outperforms site-hold by ~12 points on Overpass B

knowledge.title: Overpass A plant: behind party box, exposed to heaven
knowledge.description: Default A plant is behind party box, exposed to heaven. The lurker can pre-fire heaven defuse from long. Avoid plants in the open — CT defuses from cover.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: behind-party plant has highest post-plant WR on Overpass A
